title: CURLF Stock Earnings: Curaleaf Holdings Misses EPS, Misses Revenue for Q1 2024
text: Curaleaf Holdings reported disappointing first-quarter 2024 results. The company fell short on both key metrics: EPS Performance showed earnings per share of -7 cents, underperforming the analyst estimate of -5 cents. Revenue Performance showed the company generated $338.93 million in quarterly revenue, trailing the expected $339.35 million by approximately 0.12%. The article notes that Curaleaf Holdings just reported results for the first quarter of 2024, with this automated earnings coverage drawn from TradeSmith data. The piece emphasizes that results were published without human editorial intervention to deliver timely earnings information to investors.
